abort.heater_not_available: Heater not available. Try to reset the heater by pressing + and OK for some seconds.
abort.heater_not_found: Heater not found. Try to move the heater closer to Home Assistant computer.
abort.wrong_heater: The configured heater does not match the one being reconfigured.

error.connection_error: Connection failed. Try to move the heater closer to Home Assistant computer. Make sure the blue led on the heater blinks.

user.description: Reset the heater by pressing + and OK for some seconds. Then press and hold OK button on the heater until the blue led starts blinking before pressing Submit. Configuring heater might take some minutes.

reconfigure.description: Re-pair the heater: reset it by pressing + and OK for some seconds, then press and hold OK until the blue led starts blinking before pressing Submit. The heater must be the same one already configured.

init.description: How often Home Assistant reads the temperature from the heater.
